data_quality.speaker: npc
data_quality.text: I hope you're ready to talk about data quality. Because nobody else around here wants to.

choices.text: Tell me about the data challenges.

challenges_response.speaker: npc
challenges_response.text: Finally, someone who listens! Our data pipelines are a mess. Missing values, inconsistent formats, no documentation. AI can't learn from garbage.

sage_connection.speaker: npc
sage_connection.text: So Sage already got to you? Good. At least someone around here understands that strategy without data infrastructure is just wishful thinking.

dismissive.speaker: npc
dismissive.text: Sure. Everyone always comes back... eventually. When their models fail.

technical_detail.speaker: npc
technical_detail.text: If you want to make real progress, we need to audit the data first. No shortcuts.

check_in.speaker: npc
check_in.text: Back again. Ready to take data seriously this time?

choices.text: What's the status of the data audit?
Any quick wins we can get?

audit_update.speaker: npc
audit_update.text: I've started documenting the worst offenders. Customer data is the messiest - 40% incomplete records. We need to fix that before any ML work.

quick_wins.speaker: npc
quick_wins.text: Quick wins? In data? Ha! ...Actually, we could standardize the date formats. That alone would save hours of preprocessing.
